title: Youtube Poop: Gwonam Loses the Map
description:
My first Youtube Poop!  It's a bit short, but it's pretty good (at least I HOPE it is).

Gwonam lost the map, so the king went insane and blew everything up.  Enjoy! :)

Special thanks to StuartZX, Garbagehead3, and JeffLindbom for the inspiration!

Special thanks also to Calculate900 for showing me how to make Youtube Poop and ZZaxx726 for showing me how to upload movies!

Movies used: 
Link - The Faces of Evil
Zelda - The Wand of Gamelon
Hotel Mario

Please rate and comment!
